title: Navigation change tooltip
commit_message: feat(navigation): add one-time navigation change tooltip

acceptance_criteria.criterion: GIVEN user has not seen tooltip before, WHEN user opens What's New for the first time, THEN tooltip appears pointing to drawer
acceptance_criteria.evidence: NavigationTooltip component shows on SocialPostsListScreen when hasSeenNavTooltip is false

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Tooltip says 'Subscriptions moved to Settings. What's New is now your content feed.'
Got it button dismisses tooltip permanently
acceptance_criteria.evidence: markNavTooltipSeen mutation updates userPreferences.hasSeenNavTooltip to true

acceptance_criteria.criterion: GIVEN user has dismissed tooltip, WHEN user opens What's New again, THEN tooltip does not appear
acceptance_criteria.evidence: getHasSeenNavTooltip query checks userPreferences.hasSeenNavTooltip before showing

files_modified.changes: Added hasSeenNavTooltip field to userPreferences table
Created new component with popover UI, positioned to point at drawer
Added tooltip display logic with Convex queries/mutations

implementation_notes: Used existing Popover primitive pattern for consistent UI
Followed userPreferences pattern from notifications module
Server-side state tracking ensures dismissal persists across devices
Tooltip positioned on left side pointing to drawer menu
